items.caption: A cover of a textbook titled "a text book of modern physics paper-vi (with lab experiments) andhra edition." the cover is predominantly blue with a large, bold title in white and yellow text. below the title, the author's name, "dr. s.k. gupta," is printed in smaller white text. the background features a graphical representation of the solar system with planets and stars, suggesting the book's content is related to astronomy and physics. the publisher's logo, "knrm," is visible in the bottom right corner. the overall style of the image is educational and informative, designed to appeal to students studying physics.
